title: Recruitment, narratives and next steps
subtitle: Programme Management Group meeting 14th May 2026
author: LEND Team
excerpt: At our May programme meeting, the LEND team reviewed progress across the project as work moves into the next phase of recruitment, intervention design, and public involvement.

title: Recruitment, narratives and next steps
subtitle: Programme Management Group meeting 12th January 2026
author: LEND Team
excerpt: At our January programme meeting, the LEND team reviewed progress across the project as work moves into the next phase of recruitment, intervention design, and public involvement.

title: Recruitment, narratives and next steps
subtitle: Programme Management Group meeting 17th November 2025
author: LEND Team
excerpt: The study has been accepted for portfolio status. This is an important milestone for NIHR-funded research, as it supports recruitment and means that recruitment activity can contribute to national research portfolio reporting.

title: Learning from lived experience
subtitle: Programme Management Group meeting 15th September 2025
author: LEND Team
excerpt: At our September programme meeting, the team discussed the valuable insights gathered through LEAP (Lived Experience Advisory Panel) meetings, where people with lived experience have shared how dementia-related stories and narratives resonate with them.

title: Developing the digital intervention
subtitle: Programme Management Group meeting 25th July 2025
author: LEND Team
excerpt: At our July programme meeting, the LEND team reviewed early progress on the development of the project’s digital intervention.
